# matrix_room (Data Source)

Resolves a Matrix room by alias. State attributes are best-effort and require the caller to be a member.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "matrix_room" "support" {
  alias = "#support:example.com"
}

output "support_room_id" {
  value = data.matrix_room.support.room_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alias` (String)

### Read-Only

- `avatar_url` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `room_id` (String)
- `servers` (List of String)
- `topic` (String)
